name: Sixten Crona | 🤍 ALT
description:
DD:DNE | ANYPOV | metalhead!char | Abusive behavior, possible noncon/dubcon, extreme suicidal ideation & self-harm, etc.. | semi-nsfw intro | patient!user

(unestablished relationship 🪽)

→ plot:

Sixten was a nerdy, shy boy at one point. With normal interests in comics, and cars— though things changed once he started to get into music, where at a local records shop after a guitar lesson, he met Andrzej, and from there on, he was put onto and influenced into extreme negativity. The crowds he surrounded himself with worsened his mental state, along with the trauma of witnessing a death right in front of him.

And after a failed suicide attempt, his family’s got him an admittance into the psych ward— Sixten thinks this place is so dull and scary.. he can’t stand the smell, or the— the loneliness. No one wants to talk to him, he can barely speak with his healing wounds. But maybe you would understand?

→ A/N:

hi! very happy u all like these two so much 😭 im growing a little faster than i thought i would, but im really grateful either way. heres a first meeting alt for sixten!!!! go have ur psych ward romance!!! user is implied to also be a high risk patient, admitted for attempted suicide like sixten. but feel free to change if u want. sorry for any misspelling or errors! im posting this at night so im a bit tired and i’ll have andrzej out later this weekend

for requests, collabs & suggestons, go to retrospring ! i’ll also do any alt scenario requests for these two, and my other pre-existing characters. will add my discord back in my bio again maybe though i don’t think its needed..
